mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processing_types WHERE time = #{time} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO processing_types ( name, numbers, time) VALUES ( #{name}, #{numbers}, #{time})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM processing_types WHERE time = #{time} AND name = #{name}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, numbers, time FROM processing_types WHERE time IN
#{date}
/*SELECT numbers FROM processing_types WHERE time = #{today}*/ SELECT SUM(numbers) AS numbers, DATE(#{today}) AS time FROM processing_types WHERE DATE(time) = DATE(#{today})

SELECT YEAR(time) AS year, MONTH(time) AS month, DAY(time) AS day, SUM(numbers) AS numbers FROM processing_types WHERE DATE(time) IN
DATE(#{date})
GROUP BY YEAR(time), MONTH(time), DAY(time)

SELECT numbers, time FROM processing_types WHERE DATE_FORMAT(time, '%Y-%m') IN
DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m')

SELECT
SUM(numbers) AS numbers, DATE(#{date}) AS time FROM processing_types WHERE DATE(time) = DATE(#{date}) GROUP BY DATE(time)
